ratings.comment: The classes are a bit self-indulgent but honestly sort of entertaining. My main issues was that she assigned a long paper worth 25% of our grade at the end of the year and proceeded to never grade it, just submitting the grades as-is. We all worked hard on that assignment and it's not fair she lazily decided not to even look at it.
I LOVE DOCTOR SYFOX! she is amazing and if u put in the work she won't let u do poorly on the class. it's a very tough class but she made it bearable! deffo gonna take smthn w her again

I have a love-hate relationship with this professor. I took Greek 103 with Syfox two years ago, and at first she comes off as rude and a little passive aggressive. But after a while, I started to respect her for her teaching methods, which are tough, but well worth it. Just to get an idea, she made us read Herodotus by the end of first semester.

Do not take a class with this professor. This professor is the only professor I have developed a strong dislike for after four years as a student at UW - Madison. I don't feel comfortable asking questions or participating in class as she is very dismissive and rude if she does not like your question or answer. The attendance policy is insane.

Professor Syfox is really excellent, so much so that I have altered my schedule to take additional classes with her. She is very smart, knowledgeable, and a very interesting person. The content of the class is difficult, but that's not really on her. She has high expectations of her students but genuinely wants them to do well. Great professor!

She was wonderful for my first semester of Greek 103! The material is hard, but that's not a reflection of her teaching. With Greek, you have to want it and devote proper time each day. She was available during working hours for aid and took our requests (extra credit, extra worksheets, etc). Would take again, most respectful and encouraging prof!
